danger_signals.visual_form: Blocks accumulating toward top of playfield
danger_signals.meaning: Increasing threat of game over; player losing control of pace

danger_signals.visual_form: Blocks reaching or crossing top boundary line
danger_signals.meaning: Imminent failure state; no horizontal space remaining

safety_signals.visual_form: Horizontal lines flash/dissolve when completely filled
safety_signals.meaning: Player successfully eliminated blocks; score increase; reduced stack height

safety_signals.visual_form: Visible empty space at top of playfield
safety_signals.meaning: Player has control; safe positioning for incoming pieces

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Falling tetromino piece with shadow/preview indicator; grid background; score/level display active
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Pieces descend at speed determined by level; player input responsive; next piece queue visible

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Playfield freezes; stack reaches top boundary; game over text or screen overlay
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Input disabled; piece movement stops; transition to menu or restart state

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Level counter increments; potential color or background shift; fall speed noticeably increases
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Tetromino descent acceleration; difficulty spike in piece timing

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Responds to left/right input; rotates on button press; descends at steady rate unless accelerated by player
Remain stationary until complete line formed; then dissolve/clear
Displays upcoming tetromino; updates when current piece locks; allows player planning

notes: Tetris (Genesis 1988) is a pure puzzle paradigm with minimal narrative or faction content. World-state communication is entirely mechanical/numerical rather than thematic. Visual manifestation focuses on grid-based spatial feedback, line-clear rewards, and difficulty escalation through acceleration. No political, faction, or environmental storytelling systems present. All danger/safety signals are derived from core mechanical feedback loops rather than worldbuilding.
